events.name: China PBOC Loan Prime Rate Decision
events.description: Sets China's benchmark 1-year and 5-year lending rates, guiding borrowing costs and signalling the PBOC's policy stance.

events.name: New Zealand CPI (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Measures the annual change in New Zealand consumer prices for Q2, a key input to Reserve Bank of New Zealand policy.

events.name: UK Unemployment Rate
events.description: Tracks the share of the UK workforce without a job, a key gauge of labour market slack watched by the BoE.

events.name: Canada CPI (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Measures the annual change in Canadian consumer prices, a primary input to the Bank of Canada's rate decisions.

events.name: UK CPI (Y-o-Y)
events.description: Tracks the annual change in prices paid by UK consumers, the Bank of England's primary gauge for policy decisions.

events.name: Germany Ifo Business Climate Index
events.description: Surveys German firms on current conditions and expectations, a leading indicator for the Eurozone's largest economy.

events.name: Eurozone ECB Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The ECB Governing Council sets the deposit facility rate, driving borrowing costs and the euro across the currency bloc.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: Counts new US unemployment benefit claims filed weekly, a timely, high-frequency signal of labour market health.

events.name: US Manufacturing PMI (Flash)
events.description: S&P Global's preliminary gauge of US factory activity, an early read on manufacturing sector momentum.

events.name: Eurozone Services PMI (Flash)
events.description: S&P Global/HCOB's preliminary gauge of Eurozone service-sector activity, a timely signal of bloc-wide growth momentum.
